description: CompositionBlack capris made of 61% cotton, 33% polyester and 6% spandex, with Dri-Fit technology, a broad elasticated waistband and embroidered nike swooshFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleachLine dryDo not iron or dry cleanStylish to a T, these capris from nike are designed with Dri-Fit technology to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfortable fit. Team it with Nike Sports tees and shoes for that smart, sporty look.
